key.name: position-offset
key.description: Shift the island left (negative) or right (positive) from center.

key.name: show-album-art
key.summary: Show album art in expanded view
key.description: Display album artwork when the island is expanded on hover.

key.name: show-seek-bar
key.summary: Show seek bar in expanded view
key.description: Display playback progress bar and timestamps in the expanded view.

key.name: auto-hide
key.summary: Auto-hide when no media is active
key.description: Fully hide the island pill when no MPRIS player is running.

key.name: intercept-osd
key.description: Show volume and brightness changes inside the island instead of the default GNOME OSD popup.

key.name: show-notifications
key.summary: Show notification toasts in the island
key.description: When enabled, incoming system notifications briefly appear inside the Dynamic Island.

key.name: player-blocklist
key.description: List of MPRIS player bus-name suffixes (lowercase) that should never appear in the Dynamic Island.

key.name: animation-duration
key.description: Duration for island expand and collapse animations.

key.name: osd-timeout
key.description: How long the volume/brightness OSD remains visible before collapsing.

key.name: notch-scale
key.description: Overall scale multiplier for the island (0.5–3.0).

key.name: dynamic-art-color
key.summary: Use album art dominant colour as island background
key.description: When enabled, the island background colour is derived from the dominant colour in the current album artwork.

key.name: art-expanded-size
key.summary: Album art size in expanded view (px)
key.description: Width and height of the album artwork in the expanded hover view.

key.name: art-compact-size
key.summary: Album art thumbnail size in compact view (px)
key.description: Width and height of the small album art thumbnail in the compact playing view.
